section_name: Determination Whether Vehicle Subject to Registration or Eligible for Distinguishing License Plate
chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) The department may establish criteria to determine whether an unladen lift equipment motor vehicle that because of its design for use as lift equipment exceeds the maximum weight and width limitations prescribed by statute is subject to registration under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) or eligible for the distinguishing license plate provided by Section 502.146 (Certain Farm Vehicles and Drilling and Construction Equipment) .

(b) Notwithstanding Subsection (a), a vehicle authorized by the department before June 11, 1985, to operate without registration under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) may not be required to register under that chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.199 — Determination Whether Vehicle Subject to Registration or Eligible for Distinguishing License Plate

(a) The department may establish criteria to determine whether an unladen lift equipment motor vehicle that because of its design for use as lift equipment exceeds the maximum weight and width limitations prescribed by statute is subject to registration under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) or eligible for the distinguishing license plate provided by Section 502.146 (Certain Farm Vehicles and Drilling and Construction Equipment) .

(b) Notwithstanding Subsection (a), a vehicle authorized by the department before June 11, 1985, to operate without registration under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) may not be required to register under that chapter.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 118, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding Subsection (a), a vehicle authorized by the department before June 11, 1985, to operate without registration under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) may not be required to register under that chapter.
